$ aleph > calculating who deserves a billion dollars…_
[ press SPACE to begin ]
LT5 | Brizuela · Magbitang · Valencia · Pascua
aleph@quantum-light:~$ read --market-signal --startup 01 --year 2012
The signal // the only data the model is trained on
Sector
Web security & speed
Founders
Harvard MBAs + an engineer
Business model
Freemium — core product is free
Investors
Top-tier Silicon Valley VCs
Financials
Fast growth, not yet profitable
MOON  or  HODL  — press SPACE to reveal
The market
61%
how sure the crowd was · illustrative
the crowd passed on it
> aleph: polishing the crystal ball
// reveal — startup 01
MOONED

CLOUDFLARE

What just happenedIt looked boring and gave its product away for free, so the market passed. It grew into a ~$70 billion company. The crowd keeps walking past winners like this — and a model trained on the crowd learns to walk past them too.
Market cap · 2026
~$70B
Market said 61% · ~$5B at 2019 IPO · ~13x since
aleph@quantum-light:~$ read --market-signal --startup 02 --year 2019
The signal // the only data the model is trained on
Sector
Office space / co-working
Founder
Baruch College, no degree
Footprint
Hundreds of locations worldwide
Investors
Backed by SoftBank (multi-billion)
Valuation
$47B
MOON  or  HODL  — press SPACE to reveal
The market
92%
how sure the crowd was · illustrative
the crowd piled in
> aleph: recombobulating the prophecy
// reveal — startup 02
DOOMED

WEWORK

What just happenedIt was really just renting out office space, dressed up to look like a tech company. The market saw fast growth and a famous backer and piled in — it couldn't see the business didn't work. Train an AI on that hype and it piles in too.
Outcome · 2023
$0
Market said 92% · $47B peak · $12.8B raised
aleph@quantum-light:~$ read --market-signal --startup 03 --year 2014
The signal // the only data the model is trained on
Sector
Health diagnostics
Founder
Stanford dropout
Board
Ex-Secretaries of State & Defense
Partner
National pharmacy chain signed on
Valuation
$9B
MOON  or  HODL  — press SPACE to reveal
The market
96%
how sure the crowd was · illustrative
the crowd piled in
> aleph: reading the tea leaves
// reveal — startup 03
DOOMED

THERANOS

What just happenedOn paper it looked perfect — a star founder, a famous board, a big pharmacy deal. All of it was fake. The market believed it for years, and a model learns from that same record. It can't tell a real story from a lie either.
Outcome · fraud
$0
Market said 96% · $9B peak · $900M+ raised · founder jailed
aleph@quantum-light:~$ bias

The market was most sure about the two that died.

Hype runs hottest exactly where the outcome turns out worst. Build an AI on this human record and it doesn't fix the bias. It inherits it, hidden behind a confident number.

market 61%
MOONED
market 92%
DOOMED
market 96%
FRAUD
COOL — the market shrugged
HOT — the market piled in
aleph@quantum-light:~$ lagging behind

Fast to decide. Slow to find out.

Seed proves the idea, Series A proves demand, Series B scales it. Series B is where the model plays, and the catch is the clock.

year 3year 6year 9
THE DECISION
1 DAY
It scores. Money goes in.
THE TRUTH
5-10 YRS
It finally exits or dies.
the model only learns here, years after the bet was placed. by then it has made thousands more.
aleph@quantum-light:~$ accountability

Accountability is a human standard.

vs

When a Tesla on Full Self-Driving killed a pedestrian in 2023, the family sued the maker and the driver, never the algorithm. A human always has to answer. (Transport Topics, 2026)

aleph@quantum-light:~$ governance?

Govern it in layers.

No single control is enough. You stack them, each layer catching what the one below it can't.

01AccountabilityA named human signs every call.
02Input integrityVerify the data, not just the score.
03Audit trailAn immutable log outside the model.
04Live monitoringWatch the blind spots in real time.

Thank you for a very enjoyable game.

LT5 · Brizuela · Magbitang · Valencia · Pascua
